titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Faculty of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Records
Faculty of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday July 6, 2019 at 08:09
finding aid revision description not supplied

did.unittitle: Faculty of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of minutes, reports, memoranda, rosters, agendas, and reviews documenting the activities of the Council on Planning and Priorities and the Executive Committee of the Yale Faculty of Arts and Sciences.

corpname.part: Yale University. Faculty of Arts and Sciences

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 14-A (YRG 14-A), Records of governing bodies and committees of the Yale Faculty of Arts and Sciences.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Faculty of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Records (RU 743). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of minutes, reports, memoranda, rosters, agendas, and reviews documenting the activities of the Council on Planning and Priorities and the Executive Committee of the Yale Faculty of Arts and Sciences.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

corpname.part: Yale University. Faculty of Arts and Sciences

did.unittitle: Records of the Council on Planning and Priorities
